name: M M Forgings Limited
summary: M M Forgings Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells steel forgings in India. The company offers steel forgings in raw, semi-machined, and fully machined stages in various grades of carbon, alloy, micro-alloy, and stainless steels. It also produces green energy from its solar and wind farms. The company also exports its products. The company was formerly known as The Madras Motors Ltd and changed its name to M M Forgings Limited in 1993. M M Forgings Limited was incorporated in 1945 and is based in Chennai, India.
